name: Kubernetes private service-mesh fixture

module_reference.name: Private service mesh workload fixture
module_reference.source: kubernetes provider plus service-mesh manifest wrappers
module_reference.upstream_note: The fixture models internal-only service mesh deployments that still carry useful workload, service, and RBAC evidence.

notes: Models an internal-only workload behind a ClusterIP service and service-mesh wrappers.
The fixture should not become public unless rendered ingress or public service evidence is added.
